briefdescription.para: This function handles a Setup Data packet from the host.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to Usb_DevData instance of the controller.
is the structure containing the setup request.

briefdescription.para: This file contains definitions used chapter 9 specific code.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 sg 06/06/16 First release 1.1 vak 30/11/16 updated for adding ch9 function callbacks 1.2 mn 01/20/17 fix to assign EP number and direction from wIndex field 1.4 BK 12/01/18 Renamed the file and added changes to have a common example for all USB IPs.
